CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petitions To Approve The Compromise Of Three Minors.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Jess P. Yanez, Esq. appeared for petitioner Maria Lopez, the Guardian ad Litem for the minors Jahtziri Aguilera, Juanoctavio Aguilera and Oscar Aguilera.
Petitioner's appearance at today's hearing was waived by the Court at the last calling of the case.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Jahtziri Aguilera:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $5,000.00 shall be paid to petitioner, Maria Lopez, as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, without any restrictions.
Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

As to Juanoctavio Aguilera:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $5,000.00 shall be paid to petitioner, Maria Lopez, as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, without any restrictions.
Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

As to Oscar Aguilera:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $5,000.00 shall be paid to petitioner, Maria Lopez, as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, without any restrictions.
Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On The Petitions To Approve The Compromise Of Three Minors.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Continued To Jun-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jess P. Yanez, Esq,. appeared with petitioner Maria Lopez, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Oscar Aguilera and Juanocatvio Aguilera, and with the minor Jahtzira Aguilera.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Patricia Lohidoy was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.

The Court requires further information in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to June 17, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Serve Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One Special Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Brian Leach, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Carlos Flores and Touchatt Trucking, Inc.
Jess P. Yanez, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Maria Lopez

After hearing, Defendant Carlos Flores and Touchatt Trucking, Inc.'s motion to serve further responses to form and special interrogatories is granted. Verified supplemental responses without objections, shall be delivered no later than 2/9/09. Sanctions in the amount of $1040, stayed, pending submission of responses. The stay of the sanctions shall become permanent if plaintiff fully complies by 2/9/09. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
